ba.absorb.name: Absorb
ba.absorb.description: A way to end a Physical or Arts debuff early. <@ba.key>Absorb</> is not the same as <#ba.consume>consume</>.

ba.airborne.name: Physical Status: Lift
ba.airborne.description: Applies <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> on an enemy. If the enemy is already <#ba.noguard>Vulnerable</>, then add 1 stack of <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</>, and deal <@ba.phy>Physical DMG</> and <@ba.poise>Stagger</>.

ba.burning.name: Arts Reaction: Combustion
ba.burning.description:
An enemy with <@ba.burning>Combustion</> takes <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</> over time.
<@ba.burning>Combustion</> = A <#ba.spellinflict>non-Heat Infliction</> (<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_pulseinflict.webp">/<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_crystinflict.webp">/<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_naturalinflict.webp">) + <@ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</>

ba.burningonchar.name: Operator Debuff: Combustion
ba.burningonchar.description:
Certain enemy skills can apply stacks of <@ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</> to operators. 
At 4 stacks, the operator becomes <@ba.burning>Combusted</>: Temporarily take continuous <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</> that ignores their DEF.

ba.combo.name: Link
ba.combo.description: Next battle skill or ultimate cast by the team consumes the Link buff and deals more DMG, with battle skills getting a higher increase. Effects of the same type can stack, but with diminishing returns.

ba.conduct.name: Arts Reaction: Electrification
ba.conduct.description:
An enemy with <@ba.conduct>Electrification</> takes more <#ba.spelldmg>Arts DMG</>.
<@ba.conduct>Electrification</> = A <#ba.spellinflict>non-Electric Infliction</> (<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_fireinflict.webp">/<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_crystinflict.webp">/<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_naturalinflict.webp">) + <@ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</>

ba.conductonchar.name: Operator Debuff: Electrification
ba.conductonchar.description:
Certain enemy skills can apply stacks of <@ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> to operators. 
At 4 stacks, the operator becomes <@ba.conduct>Electrified</>: Temporary stun and take more <#ba.spelldmg>Arts DMG</> for a certain duration.

ba.consume.name: Debuff Consumption
ba.consume.description: Various Physical and Arts debuffs can be ended early. For example, <#ba.crush>Crush</> consumes <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> debuffs, while <#ba.burning>Combustion</> consumes <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</> debuffs.

ba.corrupt.name: Arts Reaction: Corrosion
ba.corrupt.description:
An enemy with <@ba.corrupt>Corrosion</> gradually loses resistance against all elements. 
<@ba.corrupt>Corrosion</> = A <#ba.spellinflict>non-Nature Infliction</> (<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_fireinflict.webp">/<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_pulseinflict.webp">/<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_crystinflict.webp">) + <@ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</>

ba.corruptonchar.name: Operator Debuff: Corrosion
ba.corruptonchar.description:
Certain enemy skills can apply stacks of <@ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</> to operators. 
At 4 stacks, the operator becomes <@ba.corrupt>Corroded</>: Cannot dash and suffer movement speed reduction for a certain duration.

ba.crush.name: Physical Status: Crush
ba.crush.description: Applies <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> on an enemy. If the enemy is already <#ba.noguard>Vulnerable</>, then <#ba.consume>consume</> all <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> stacks and deal massive <@ba.phy>Physical DMG</>.

ba.crystbreak.name: Shatter
ba.crystbreak.description: To an enemy with active <#ba.frozen>Solidification</>, applying <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> or <#ba.physicalstatus>Physical Status</> effects will <#ba.consume>consume</> the <#ba.frozen>Solidification</> to trigger Shatter that deals massive <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</>.

ba.crystburst.name: Arts Burst: Cryo
ba.crystburst.description: <#ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> + <#ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> will trigger <@ba.cryst>Cryo Burst</> that deals <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</> to enemies.

ba.crystenhance.name: Cryo Amp
ba.crystenhance.description: Cryo Amped targets temporarily deal more <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.

ba.crystinflict.name: Arts Infliction: Cryo
ba.crystinflict.description:
<@ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> is a type of <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</>. 
Up to 4 stacks of <@ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> can be applied and stacking triggers <#ba.crystburst>Cryo Burst</>. 
A <#ba.spellinflict>non-Cryo Infliction</> (<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_fireinflict.webp">/<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_pulseinflict.webp">/<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_naturalinflict.webp">) + <@ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> = <#ba.frozen>Solidification</>

ba.crystonchar.name: Operator Debuff: Cryo Infliction
ba.crystonchar.description:
Certain enemy skills can apply stacks of <@ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> to operators. 
At 4 stacks, the operator becomes <@ba.frozen>Solidified</>: Cannot move for a certain duration.

ba.crystvul.name: Cryo Susceptibility
ba.crystvul.description: Cryo Susceptible targets temporarily take more <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.

ba.dispel.name: Dispel
ba.dispel.description: This removes specific debuffs from the operator.

ba.dot.name: DMG Over Time
ba.dot.description: DMG over time cannot trigger critical hits.

ba.enhance.name: Amp
ba.enhance.description: Amped targets deal more DMG of the element it is Amped for. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.

ba.fireburst.name: Arts Burst: Heat
ba.fireburst.description: <#ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</> + <#ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</> will trigger <@ba.fire>Heat Burst</> that deals <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</> to enemies.

ba.fireenhance.name: Heat Amp
ba.fireenhance.description: Heat Amped targets temporarily deal more <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.

ba.fireinflict.name: Arts Infliction: Heat
ba.fireinflict.description:
<@ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</> is a type of <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</>. 
Up to 4 stacks of <@ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</> can be applied and stacking triggers <#ba.fireburst>Heat Burst</>. 
A <#ba.spellinflict>non-Heat Infliction</> (<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_pulseinflict.webp">/<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_crystinflict.webp">/<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_naturalinflict.webp">) + <@ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</> = <#ba.burning>Combustion</>

ba.fireonchar.name: Operator Debuff: Heat Infliction
ba.fireonchar.description:
Certain enemy skills can apply stacks of <@ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</> to operators. 
At 4 stacks, the operator becomes <@ba.burning>Combusted</>: Temporarily take continuous <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</> that ignores their DEF.

ba.firevul.name: Heat Susceptibility
ba.firevul.description: Heat Susceptible targets temporarily take more <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.

ba.fracture.name: Physical Status: Breach
ba.fracture.description: Applies <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> on an enemy. If the enemy is already <#ba.noguard>Vulnerable</>, then <#ba.consume>consume</> all <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> stacks, deal <@ba.phy>Physical DMG</>, and temporarily increase the <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> taken by the enemy.

ba.frozen.name: Arts Reaction: Solidification
ba.frozen.description:
An enemy with <@ba.frozen>Solidification</> cannot move, and applying <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> or a <#ba.physicalstatus>Physical Status</> to the enemy triggers the <#ba.crystbreak>Shatter</> effect. 
<@ba.frozen>Solidification</> = A <#ba.spellinflict>non-Cryo Infliction</> (<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_fireinflict.webp">/<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_pulseinflict.webp">/<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_naturalinflict.webp">) + <@ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</>

ba.frozenonchar.name: Operator Debuff: Solidification
ba.frozenonchar.description:
Certain enemy skills can apply stacks of <@ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</> to operators. 
At 4 stacks, the operator becomes <@ba.frozen>Solidified</>: Cannot move for a certain duration.

ba.guard.name: Protect
ba.guard.description: Protected targets temporarily take reduced DMG. The number represents the degree of reduction. When there are multiple effects of the same type, only the most powerful applies.

ba.knockdown.name: Physical Status: Knock Down
ba.knockdown.description: Applies <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> on an enemy. If the enemy is already <#ba.noguard>Vulnerable</>, then add 1 stack of <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</>, and deal <@ba.phy>Physical DMG</> and <@ba.poise>Stagger</>.

ba.lastcombo.name: Final Strike
ba.lastcombo.description: Final Strike is the last sequence of basic attack. When the controlled operator's Final Strike hits the enemy, it also deals <@ba.poise>Stagger</> and restores some Skill Points (SP).

ba.naturalburst.name: Arts Burst: Nature
ba.naturalburst.description: <#ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</> + <#ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</> will trigger <@ba.natur>Nature Burst</> that deals <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</> to enemies.

ba.naturalenhance.name: Nature Amp
ba.naturalenhance.description: Nature Amped targets temporarily deal more <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.

ba.naturalinflict.name: Arts Infliction: Nature
ba.naturalinflict.description:
<@ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</> is a type of <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</>. 
Up to 4 stacks of <@ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</> can be applied and stacking triggers <#ba.naturalburst>Nature Burst</>. 
A <#ba.spellinflict>non-Nature Infliction</> (<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_fireinflict.webp">/<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_pulseinflict.webp">/<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_crystinflict.webp">) + <@ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</> = <#ba.corrupt>Corrosion</>

ba.naturalonchar.name: Operator Debuff: Nature Infliction
ba.naturalonchar.description:
Certain enemy skills can apply stacks of <@ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</> to operators. 
At 4 stacks, the operator becomes <@ba.corrupt>Corroded</>: Cannot dash and suffer movement speed reduction for a certain duration.

ba.naturalvul.name: Nature Susceptibility
ba.naturalvul.description: Nature Susceptible targets temporarily take more <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.

ba.noguard.name: Vulnerable
ba.noguard.description:
Hitting an enemy for the first time with a skill with <#ba.physicalstatus>Physical Status</> applies <@ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> instead of the actual Physical Status.
A <@ba.phy>Vulnerable</> enemy can be <#ba.airborne>Lifted</> and <#ba.knockdown>Knocked Down</> to add more Vulnerability stacks (up to 4). Hitting a Vulnerable enemy with <#ba.crush>Crush</> or <#ba.fracture>Breach</> will <#ba.consume>consume</> the Vulnerability stacks.

ba.originium.name: Originium Crystal
ba.originium.description: The Endministrator's combo skill attaches Originium Crystals to enemies and immobilizes them.

ba.physicalenhance.name: Physical Amp
ba.physicalenhance.description: Physical Amped targets temporarily deal more <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.

ba.physicalstatus.name: Physical Status
ba.physicalstatus.description: Physical Statuses refer to physical debuffs applied to the enemy. They include: <#ba.airborne>Lifted</>, <#ba.knockdown>Knocked Down</>, <#ba.crush>Crushed</>, and <#ba.fracture>Breached</>.

ba.physicalvul.name: Physical Susceptibility
ba.physicalvul.description: Physical Susceptible targets temporarily take more <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.

ba.poiseknot.name: Stagger Node
ba.poiseknot.description: Some powerful enemies have <@ba.poise>Stagger Nodes</>. Deal enough <@ba.poise>Stagger</> to reach the <@ba.poise>Stagger Node</> to interrupt such enemies and make them stumble.

ba.pulseburst.name: Arts Burst: Electric
ba.pulseburst.description: <#ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> + <#ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> will trigger <@ba.pulse>Electric Burst</> that deals <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</> to enemies.

ba.pulseenhance.name: Electric Amp
ba.pulseenhance.description: Electric Amped targets temporarily deal more <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.

ba.pulseinflict.name: Arts Infliction: Electric
ba.pulseinflict.description:
<@ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> is a type of <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</>. 
Up to 4 stacks of <@ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> can be applied and stacking triggers <#ba.pulseburst>Electric Burst</>. 
A <#ba.spellinflict>non-Electric Infliction</> (<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_fireinflict.webp">/<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_crystinflict.webp">/<image="/icons/icon_term_ba_naturalinflict.webp">) + <@ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> = <#ba.conduct>Electrification</>

ba.pulseonchar.name: Operator Debuff: Electric Infliction
ba.pulseonchar.description:
Certain enemy skills can apply stacks of <@ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</> to operators. 
At 4 stacks, the operator becomes <@ba.conduct>Electrified</>: Temporary stun and take more <#ba.spelldmg>Arts DMG</> for a certain duration.

ba.pulsevul.name: Electric Susceptibility
ba.pulsevul.description: Electric Susceptible targets temporarily take more <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.

ba.return.name: SP Return
ba.return.description:
After spending SP and meeting certain criteria, some of the SP spent will be returned. 
SP Return is not "SP Recovery" and does not activate SP Recovery-triggered effects. Spending returned SP also does not give Ultimate Energy.

ba.rossi.name: Razor Clawmark
ba.rossi.description: Rossi's battle skill applies a special status on the enemy. The affected target will take <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> over time, and suffers higher Physical DMG Taken and Heat DMG Taken.

ba.shield.name: Shield
ba.shield.description: The shield can absorb damage while it is active. Some shields may only absorb specific type(s) of DMG.

ba.slow.name: Slow
ba.slow.description: Slowed targets temporarily suffer movement speed reduction. The number represents the degree of reduction. When there are multiple effects of the same type, only the most powerful applies.

ba.speedup.name: Haste
ba.speedup.description: Temporarily raises the movement speed of a target. The number represents the degree of the speed increase. Effects of the same type can stack until hitting the speed cap.

ba.spellburst.name: Arts Burst
ba.spellburst.description: <@ba.key>Arts Bursts</> are triggered by stacking <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Inflictions</> of the same elements. They include <#ba.fireburst>Heat Burst</>, <#ba.pulseburst>Electric Burst</>, <#ba.crystburst>Cryo Burst</>, and <#ba.naturalburst>Nature Burst</>.

ba.spelldmg.name: DMG Type
ba.spelldmg.description:
Damage can be divided into <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</>, <@ba.key>Arts DMG</>, and <@ba.ether>Æther DMG</>.
<@ba.key>Arts DMG</> can be further divided into <@ba.fire>Heat DMG</>, <@ba.pulse>Electric DMG</>, <@ba.cryst>Cryo DMG</>, and <@ba.natur>Nature DMG</>.

ba.spellenhance.name: Arts Amp
ba.spellenhance.description: Arts Amped targets temporarily deal more <#ba.spelldmg>Arts DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.

ba.spellinflict.name: Arts Infliction
ba.spellinflict.description:
<@ba.key>Arts Inflictions</> are special Arts debuff inflicted upon the enemy. There are 4 elements of Arts Inflictions: <#ba.fireinflict>Heat Infliction</>, <#ba.pulseinflict>Electric Infliction</>, <#ba.crystinflict>Cryo Infliction</>, and <#ba.naturalinflict>Nature Infliction</>. 
Up to 4 stacks of <@ba.key>Arts Infliction</> of the same element can be applied.

ba.spellinflictonchar.name: Arts Inflictions / Arts Reactions on Operators
ba.spellinflictonchar.description:
Some enemy skills can apply stacks of <#ba.burningonchar>Heat Infliction</>, <#ba.conductonchar>Electric Infliction</>, <#ba.frozenonchar>Cryo Infliction</>, or <#ba.corruptonchar>Nature Infliction</>.
At 4 stacks of the Arts Inflictions, the operator becomes <#ba.burningonchar>Combusted</>, <#ba.conductonchar>Electrified</>, <#ba.frozenonchar>Solidified</>, or <#ba.corruptonchar>Corroded</> respectively.

ba.spellstatus.name: Arts Reaction
ba.spellstatus.description: <@ba.key>Arts Reactions</> are Arts debuffs that can be applied to the enemy. They include: <#ba.burning>Combustion</>, <#ba.conduct>Electrification</>, <#ba.frozen>Solidification</>, and <#ba.corrupt>Corrosion</>.

ba.spellvul.name: Arts Susceptibility
ba.spellvul.description: Arts Susceptible targets temporarily take more <#ba.spelldmg>Arts DMG</>. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.

ba.statuslevel.name: Status Level
ba.statuslevel.description: Status Level is the number of <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> or <#ba.spellinflict>Arts Infliction</> stacks (max 4) <#ba.consume>consumed</> when triggering a <#ba.physicalstatus>Physical Status</> or <#ba.spellstatus>Arts Reaction</>. The higher the <#ba.statuslevel>Status Level</>, the stronger the resulting <#ba.physicalstatus>Physical Status</> or <#ba.spellstatus>Arts Reaction</>.

ba.vulnerable.name: Susceptible
ba.vulnerable.description: Susceptible targets temporarily take more DMG of the element it is Susceptible to. The number represents the degree of increase. Effects of the same type can stack.

ba.weak.name: Weaken
ba.weak.description: Weakened targets temporarily deal reduced DMG. The number represents the degree of reduction. Effects of the same type can stack non-linearly.
